caption: The video shows a close-up view of a car's dashboard, specifically focusing on the instrument cluster. Initially, the display indicates that the brake light is on and prompts the driver to "Press Brake and Push Button to Start," with the odometer reading 20434 miles. The speedometer needle is at zero, indicating the car is stationary. As the video progresses, there is no significant change in the display or the position of the speedometer needle, suggesting that the car has not been started or moved. The camera remains steady, maintaining a clear view of the dashboard throughout the sequence.
